name: Embassy Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Embassy Bancorp, Inc. is a Pennsylvania bank holding company that owns Embassy Bank For The Lehigh Valley, a community bank serving consumers, businesses, and professionals in Lehigh and Northampton Counties, PA. It offers checking, savings, money market, and time deposits, along with commercial real estate loans, residential mortgages, home equity products, consumer loans, ACH origination, cash management, mobile banking, and merchant processing services.

products.name: Checking (Demand) Deposits
products.description: Non-interest-bearing and interest-bearing checking accounts for consumers and businesses.

products.name: Savings Deposits
products.description: Savings accounts offered to retail and business customers.

products.name: Money Market Deposits
products.description: Money market deposit accounts for consumers and businesses.

products.name: Time Deposits / CDs
products.description: Fixed-term deposit products including individual retirement accounts.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Secured loans for real estate operators and businesses, a primary loan concentration.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: Fixed-rate purchase, refinancing, and first-time homebuyer mortgages originated and serviced in-house.

products.name: Home Equity Loans and Lines of Credit
products.description: Fixed- and variable-rate home equity products for retail customers.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Term loans, lines of credit, and demand loans for businesses with revenues under $30 million.

products.name: Construction Loans
products.description: Floating-rate construction loans that may convert to permanent financing upon project completion.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Auto loans, unsecured personal loans, and overdraft lines of credit for retail customers.

products.name: Cash Management Services
products.description: Treasury and cash management solutions for business clients.

products.name: Mobile Banking
products.description: Digital banking platform providing mobile and online banking access for consumers and businesses.

products.name: Remote Deposit Capture
products.description: Electronic check deposit service for business and consumer customers.

products.name: Merchant Processing
products.description: Credit/debit card merchant processing services offered to business customers.

products.name: ACH Origination
products.description: Automated Clearing House origination and direct deposit services.

products.name: Safe Deposit Boxes
products.description: Secure storage boxes available at branch locations.

products.name: Wire Transfers
products.description: Domestic wire transfer services for customers.
